title: Pivot plan to robust DW
summary: Pivoted the active manuscript plan to the robust DW comparison structure and removed the old constructive route from active planning surfaces.

user_inputs.text: Update the manuscript plan to the new structure: first show noisy sign-restricted sets are biased with intuitive visualization, then show standard Drautzburg-Wright higher-moment refinements are misspecified under noise and can shrink the set falsely, then propose a robust DW-style higher-moment approach that drops second-moment restrictions, compare DW and robust sets as a robustness check, plan Monte Carlo evidence, defer applications, and remove old Bonhomme-Robin route mentions from the active paper plan and project controls.

agent_actions.description: Rewrote the paper plan, paper map, draft skeleton, source packet, dashboard, task board, workplan, registry, citation provenance, literature search, and replication plan around noisy sign-set bias, standard DW false sharpening, robust DW higher moments, and Monte Carlo comparison evidence.
Removed old constructive-route references from active planning files, the robust-DW derivation note, and the active bibliography snapshot.

checks.description: python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed with expected open-milestone warning before closure
python scripts/check_manuscript.py: passed after milestone closure
